title: Creating an appointment in calendar with a time range
excerpt: When a customer calls we create a contact and schedule an appointment time for a tech to visit the customer. With our current app we can set a time frame. ex. 9am to 11am. How can i create this on my monday.com calendar.…

posts.author: Snelms (Sean Nelms)
posts.cookedHtml:
When a customer calls we create a contact and schedule an appointment time for a tech to visit the customer. With our current app we can set a time frame. ex. 9am to 11am. How can i create this on my monday.com calendar. is there a setting that will allow that as an option?
Thank you.
SN
